/usr/bin/c++ -DLOCAL_MODE -std=c++11 -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/infaas_offline_query.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/infaas_offline_query.dir/infaas_offline_query.cc.o -o ../../bin/infaas_offline_query   -L/usr/local/lib  -L/usr/local/lib64  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/local/lib:/usr/local/lib64:/home/daniel08/Desktop/WORK/PROGRAMMING_WORLD/PROJECTS_RESEARCH/Templates/DIFS/build/src/master:/home/daniel08/Desktop/WORK/PROGRAMMING_WORLD/PROJECTS_RESEARCH/Templates/DIFS/build/src/metadata-store -lgrpc++_unsecure -lgrpc -lgpr ../master/libinf-master.so ../metadata-store/libredis-md.so -lredox /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libhiredis.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libev.so ../../protos/libinfaas-protos.a ../../protos/internal/libinfaas-protos-internal.a /usr/local/lib/libprotobuf.so -lgrpc++ -lgrpc /usr/local/lib/libprotobuf.so
